name: Chilisalya
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Ground ancho or pasilla chile
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a skillet over medium heat.
2. Add onions and garlic to the skillet. Cook until softened, stirring occasionally.
3. Stir in flour, then add tomatoes, ground chile, tarragon vinegar, dried oregano, and brown sugar.
4. Bring the mixture to a simmer, stirring frequently.
5. Simmer for 15 minutes or until the sauce has thickened slightly.
